Description:
Returns personalized product recommendations based on detected conditions,
skin type, Fitzpatrick type, and user preferences.
Uses Fit Score algorithm with evidence-weighted matching.
DescHTML: Returns personalized product recommendations based on detected conditions, skin type, Fitzpatrick type, and user preferences. Uses Fit Score algorithm with evidence-weighted matching.

Responses.rawYaml:
description: Recommendations returned
content:
    application/json:
        schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RecommendationResponse'

curlJson: [{"label":"Production · No Auth","serverUrl":"https://skingenius-sigma.vercel.app","serverDescription":"Production","securityLabel":"No Auth","command":"curl -X POST \\\n  'https://skingenius-sigma.vercel.app/api/v1/recommendations' \\\n  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n  -H 'Accept: application/json' \\\n  -d '{\"conditions\":[{\"condition_id\":\"tpq\",\"confidence\":0,\"features\":[\"WyY\"],\"name\":\"Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH)\",\"severity\":\"moderate\",\"zone\":\"cheek-left\"}],\"fitzpatrick_type\":4,\"price_tier\":\"$\",\"skin_type\":\"combination\"}'"}]
SchemaJSON:
{"description":"Returns personalized product recommendations based on detected conditions,
skin type, Fitzpatrick type, and user preferences.
Uses Fit Score algorithm with evidence-weighted matching.
","operationId":"getRecommendations","requestBody":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/RecommendationRequest"}}},"required":true},"responses":{"200":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/RecommendationResponse"}}},"description":"Recommendations returned"}},"summary":"Get product recommendations"}
